_Notes.CameraIndex: Index of the specific Miniscope V4 to record from
_Notes.FramesPerSecond: Valid values: 10 Hz | 15 Hz | 20 Hz | 25 Hz | 30 Hz
_Notes.BufferSize: Number of frames used for time-series visualization
_Notes.FileName: Absolute file path, used to save *.avi and *.csv files. The ~ character can be used as a placeholder for the user's home directory (e.g. C:\Users\username).
_Notes.CompressVideo: Compress the video (true) or record the raw frames (false)
